title: C2H6S Tinker
description:
English adaption is in progress...
This mod is a Tconstruct addon based on some of my random thoughts and it also contians some sort of memes.
body:
**Note: Since this mod is still under rapid development,English translation for modifiers is still missing.

目前1.19.2版本还处于测试版
Sofar, this mod is still in early developement.

需要安装对应模组才能正常加载材料和配方。
You need to install mods like thermal,mekanism or so on to load all the materials.

2024/9/20| 1.19.2-2.0.0-alpha-09b：截至目前版本，已经添加了：
Till now, this mod has added:

    ·  33种工具材料和90个工具属性；
    ·  33 new materials and over 90 modifiers.

        --  17种护甲材料和17个护甲属性；
        --  17 new armor materials and 17 armor modifiers

    ·  2种新的的工具类型；
    ·  2 brand new tools:

        --离子化射线炮：一种长距离蓄力近战武器，消耗流体进行攻击，不同流体会有不同的效果，具有可观的范围伤害。
        --Ionized Cannon:Conume Fluids to deal damage, can attack enemies in a large range.

        --约束等离子阔剑：攻速很高的近战武器，挥舞时消耗冶炼炉燃料类型的流体释放一道具有范围伤害的刀光，伤害受燃料温度影响。
        --Constrained Plasma Saber:Sword with high attack speed,comsume Melting Fluid to deal damage ,also attacks in a large range.

    ·  9种新的冶炼炉燃料。
    ·  9 new Melting Fuel.

材料联动信息*：
Mod Requirements:

联动了热力系列的材料：地岩信素、震荡流明、霜覆末影、彩钢板、活化彩钢板；
Materials that requires Thermal Series: Basalz Signalum ,Blitz Lumium ,Blizz Enderium ,Chroma Plate ,Activated Chroma Plate;

联动了通用机械的材料：反物质、奇异物质、超致密、反中子、质子、电子、三位一体强互作用合金、宏原子、强化荧石、强化黑曜石、原子合金；
Materials that requires Mekanism: Pellet Antimatter ,Exotic Matter ,Ultra Dense ,Anti Neutronium ,Protonium ,Electronium ,Trinity Interactive Alloy ,Marcoatom ,Reinforced Glowstone ,Reinforced Obsidian ,Alloy Atomic

联动了应用能源2的材料：赛特斯神晶、福鲁伊克斯魂晶、谐振魔晶、邪理魔球、完美通用物品；
Materials that requires AE2:Blood Certus ,Soul Fluix ,Devil Resonance ,Evil Orb ,Perfect Generic Item.

联动了 Ad Astra!的材料：星钢、星冕合金；
Materials that requires Ad Astra!:Stellar Alloy ,Cornation Alloy;

联动了沉浸工艺的材料：铋、硬铅；
Materials that requires Immersive Engineering:Bismuth ,Hard Lead;

联动了Powah!的材料：天地宝晶；
Materials that requires Powah!:Earth Crystal;

联动了植物魔法的材料：魔灵皇钢；
Materials that requires Botanis:Manalyn Queen;

联动了循环的材料：琥珀结晶、黑曜石结晶；
Materials that requires Cyclic: Gem Amber ,Gem Obsidian;

奇迹物质材料需要同时装载Mek、热力系列和AE2才能获取。
Material Exo Alloy requires Mekanism,Thermal Series,AE2 to be installed at the same time.

添加燃料：液态氢、熔融KNSU燃料、生物燃料、乙醇、液态乙烯、乙烯、液态氘氚燃料、超充能流体中子（Mek）、湮灭等离子体（Mek）。
Fuel addition:
Hydrogen(Mekanism) ,molten KNSU ,Bio-fuel(Industrial Foregoing) ,Ethanol(Immersive Engineering) ,Ethene(Mekanism) ,Ethylene(Immersive Petroleum) ,Fusion Fuel(Mekanism) ,Over Charged Neutronium(Added When Mekanism is loaded) ,Annihilating Plasma(Added When Mekanism is loaded).

Not tested on Dedicated Server!!!
